title: Shredded Chipotle & Pineapple Chicken Tacos
summary: Sticky, spicy chipotle chicken loaded into soft tortillas with a zingy pineapple salsa. For an extra whack of protein, we've added herby cottage cheese.

method.description: Pour the pineapple juice and chicken stock into a saucepan. Stir through the chipotle paste (add less if you don't like spice) and season with salt. Nestle in the chicken breasts, set over a medium-high heat and bring to the boil. Turn the heat down to medium-low and simmer for 10-15 mins, until the chicken is cooked through.

Meanwhile, finely dice the red onion. Roughly chop the pineapple and add both to a bowl. Zest one of the limes and set the zest aside. Squeeze over the juice of two limes and season with salt. Toss together and set aside to pickle.

Pick a few coriander leaves for garnish, then chuck the rest (stalks and all) into a blender with the cottage cheese. Blitz until smooth and season with salt and lime zest - If you don’t want to blend, finely chop the coriander and stir it through instead.

Once the chicken is cooked, transfer it to a board and use two forks to shred. Return the shredded chicken to the pan and crank the heat to high. Let it bubble away for 5-10 mins until the sauce coats the chicken nicely.
Toast the tortillas in a dry frying pan or directly over a flame until soft and warmed through.

Build your tacos. Fill each tortilla with the juicy chipotle chicken, a generous spoonful of the coriander cottage cheese and the tangy pineapple salsa. Scatter with the reserved coriander leaves and serve with lime wedges on the side.

chefs.name: Chloe René
chefs.summary: Chloe (@chlo_eat) takes inspiration from her diverse upbringing to create recipes and dishes influenced from cultures around the world. Despite her classical training, Chloe's philosophy in the kitchen revolves around simplicity and home-cooking. She firmly believes that the essence of a great meal lies in the quality of ingredients and the care put into their preparation. Instead of relying on complex and technical processes, Chloe prizes the art of letting ingredients shine through, enhancing their natural flavours with a delicate touch.
